items.name: shopping-cart
items.title: Shopping cart
items.description: Cart with line items, totals, and empty state for React Native and Uniwind.
items.docs: Depends on local `reusables` (Button, Separator, UIText), `reusables/lib/utils` (cn), and `uniwind`. Align import paths with your app aliases after install.

items.name: marketing-blocks
items.title: Marketing blocks
items.description: Page intro, stats, feature grid, callout, summary panel, and surface grid blocks.
items.docs: `types.ts` re-exports shopping-cart types; those files are included so the barrel resolves. Depends on `reusables` (Badge, Card, Separator, UIText) and `uniwind`.

items.name: hero-3
items.title: Hero 3
items.description: Marketing hero with heading, reviews row, CTAs, and side image (React Native + Uniwind).
items.docs: Uses `Avatar`, `Button`, `UIText`, `Linking.openURL` for button URLs. Remote SVG hero images may need a raster `imageUrl` on some platforms.
